title: Project Bootstrap & Architecture Setup
body:
Initialize backend project with production-style structure.

Scope:
- Setup folder structure (modules, config, database, shared)
- Configure TypeScript
- Setup ESLint + Prettier + Husky hooks
- Create environment configuration loader
- Add centralized error handling pattern
- Add health check endpoint

Acceptance Criteria:
- Project builds without errors
- Lint + format run automatically
- Environment variables validated at startup
- Base architecture ready for scaling

title: PostgreSQL Integration & Database Layer
body:
Configure database connectivity and abstraction layer.

Scope:
- Setup PostgreSQL connection with pooling
- Create database module
- Add migration system
- Configure transactional support
- Add base repository pattern
- Setup query logging for development

Acceptance Criteria:
- DB connects successfully
- Migration runs via CLI
- Transactions supported
- Connection pooling configured

title: Users Schema + Migration + Constraints
body:
Design and implement production-ready users table.

Scope:
- Create users migration
- Add constraints (unique email, not null fields)
- Add indexes for lookup performance
- Implement soft delete support
- Add timestamps and auditing fields
- Validate schema with seed data

Acceptance Criteria:
- Migration reversible
- Indexes applied correctly
- Duplicate email rejected
- Schema tested with inserts

title: Authentication Module (Registration Flow)
body:
Implement secure user registration system.

Scope:
- Input validation layer
- Password hashing (bcrypt)
- DTO + service + controller layers
- Error handling strategy
- Prevent duplicate registrations
- Add unit tests for service logic

Acceptance Criteria:
- Password stored hashed
- Validation errors handled cleanly
- API tested via Postman
- Unit tests passing

title: JWT Authentication & Authorization Middleware
body:
Implement login + token-based authentication.

Scope:
- Login endpoint
- JWT generation + verification
- Auth middleware
- Role-based guard structure
- Token expiration strategy
- Secure config management

Acceptance Criteria:
- Protected routes require token
- Invalid tokens rejected
- Middleware reusable
- Auth flow documented

title: Organizer Domain Modeling
body:
Implement organizer entity and relation to users.

Scope:
- Create organizers table
- Define 1:1 relation with users
- Add verification flag + metadata
- Implement organizer creation flow
- Add authorization rules
- Seed organizer test data

Acceptance Criteria:
- Organizer linked correctly to user
- Cannot create event without organizer role
- Schema validated with joins

title: Venues Management Module
body:
Create venue model for hosting events.

Scope:
- Venues schema + migration
- Capacity validation logic
- Geo-location fields
- CRUD endpoints for venues
- Add indexing for city searches
- Add sample venue dataset

Acceptance Criteria:
- Venue CRUD functional
- Capacity enforced
- Queries optimized with indexes

title: Events Core Domain Implementation
body:
Implement main events entity and lifecycle.

Scope:
- Events table with FK relations
- Status lifecycle (draft → published → cancelled)
- Date validation logic
- Event creation service
- Organizer ownership enforcement
- Add integration tests

Acceptance Criteria:
- Event linked to venue + organizer
- Invalid dates rejected
- Lifecycle works correctly

title: Event Creation API + Validation Layer
body:
Expose production-ready API for creating events.

Scope:
- Request validation schemas
- Authorization enforcement
- Service-level business validation
- Logging for audit trail
- API response standardization
- Add error scenarios testing

Acceptance Criteria:
- Only organizers allowed
- Validation prevents bad input
- Responses follow unified format

title: Ticket Types Domain (Pricing Engine Foundation)
body:
Implement ticket tier system for events.

Scope:
- Ticket types schema
- Pricing + quantity constraints
- Sale window validation
- Prevent overselling logic foundation
- Index for fast availability lookup
- Prepare structure for future dynamic pricing

Acceptance Criteria:
- Ticket types linked to event
- Quantity cannot go negative
- Sale window enforced
- Query performance validated
